title: Fox Run Mortar and Pestle, Marble, White , 4.75"
description:
About this item
ROUGH INTERIOR, FOR SMOOTH RESULTS: This mortar comes with an unpolished interior, with just enough of an edge to get great grinding results so. Never again settle for grocery store spices-- use herbs and nuts you've grown yourself or have raw, grind them up, and allow the flavor to shine through.
GET IT DONE IN ONE: This herb grinding bowl include both the mortar and the pestle so you have everything you need to grind up fresh ingredients!
UNIQUE MARBLE VARIATIONS ensure that this stone mortar and pestle will be one-of-a-kind, making this the perfect housewarming or wedding gift.
ELEGANT AND SLEEK DESIGN: Due to its white marble finish, this bowl is sure to beautifully complement any kitchen space.
MEASUREMENTS AND CARE: This mortar and pestle weighs 1.4 pounds. Mortar has dimensions of 4.75” x 4.75” x 4.25”. Pestle has dimensions of 1.25” x 1.25” x 5.25”. Hand wash only, not dishwasher safe.
reviews_5s: very goodThis is high-quality, durable and super easy to clean. It’s a little pricey than most, but totally worth it.Love it! Used it to crush salt. Easy to use and easy to clean. Just don’t ever drop it on your foot! Is heavy.ThanksVery nice!Me gusto el tamaño del mortero, el color, el pilón es de buen tamaño, lo que permite un agarre buenoPerfect size for grinding flax seeds and chia seeds to go in my breakfast steel cut oats. The oils from the seeds washes off easily.Justo como aparecen en la foto.
reviews_1s: came broken!It looked perfect but broke on second use.Llego quebrado , tendré que devolverlo
